title: Open the app and verify the home page
test_steps: Open the shopping app. | Verify that the header contains the menu icon, logo, and shopping bag icon.
expected_result: The menu icon, logo, and shopping bag icon are present in the header.

title: Navigate through the navigation menu
test_steps: Open the shopping app. | Tap on the navigation menu icon in the header. | Tap on each category in the navigation menu: & BEAUTY, CHILDREN, HOMWARE, and UPCOMING SALES.
expected_result: The app navigates to the respective category pages.

title: Select a product category
test_steps: Open the shopping app. | Tap on the navigation menu icon in the header. | Tap on the 'Brilliant Lighting' category in the grid.
expected_result: The app navigates to the 'Brilliant Lighting' category page.

title: Search for a product
test_steps: Open the shopping app. | Tap on the navigation menu icon in the header. | Tap on the search icon (if available). | Enter a search term and tap the search button.
expected_result: The app displays search results for the entered term.

title: Add a product to the shopping bag
test_steps: Open the shopping app. | Tap on the navigation menu icon in the header. | Tap on a product category in the grid. | Select a product and add it to the shopping bag.
expected_result: The product is added to the shopping bag.

title: Check product details
test_steps: Open the shopping app. | Tap on the navigation menu icon in the header. | Tap on a product category in the grid. | Select a product and view its details.
expected_result: The product details page is displayed.

title: Verify product availability
test_steps: Open the shopping app. | Tap on the navigation menu icon in the header. | Tap on a product category in the grid. | Select a product and verify its availability.
expected_result: The product availability status is displayed.

title: Check product ratings and reviews
test_steps: Open the shopping app. | Tap on the navigation menu icon in the header. | Tap on a product category in the grid. | Select a product and view its ratings and reviews.
expected_result: The product ratings and reviews are displayed.

title: Verify product pricing
test_steps: Open the shopping app. | Tap on the navigation menu icon in the header. | Tap on a product category in the grid. | Select a product and verify its pricing.
